templates.name: L&D Operations Dashboard
templates.description: Comprehensive L&D operations view. 6-cell KPI strip (Total days, Total hours, Completed trainings, Future registrations, Cost, Cancellations) + 3x3 chart grid: completed/cancelled by org (top 10), hours by age category pie, future registrations by org, top vendors by hours, hours per activity type, hours by month trend, vendors by spend. The densest L&D view — for L&D directors and ops teams.

panels.strip: total_days + total_hours + completed_trainings + future_hours + cost_completed + cancellations

templates.embedding_text:
L&D Operations Dashboard
Comprehensive L&D operations view. 6-cell KPI strip (Total days, Total hours, Completed trainings, Future registrations, Cost, Cancellations) + 3x3 chart grid: completed/cancelled by org (top 10), hours by age category pie, future registrations by org, top vendors by hours, hours per activity type, hours by month trend, vendors by spend. The densest L&D view — for L&D directors and ops teams.

templates.name: Learning Measurement Dashboard
templates.description: Enterprise learning measurement. Three-column layout. Left: Learning Metrics panel (Learners total/repeated, Cost total/avg, Hours total/avg, Attempts total/avg). Center: Assigned Training Compliance donut (Assigned/Completed/In Progress/Overdue). Right: Instructor Led Training KPI grid (Instructors, ILTs Conducted, Avg Capacity, Attendance Rate, ILT Hours, Avg Hours/Class). Bottom row: Learners by Job bar + Top Courses table + Courses Used YOY line.

panels.top_right: ilt_kpi_grid (instructors + ilts_conducted + capacity + attendance + hours + avg_hours)

templates.embedding_text:

templates.name: LMS Engagement Dashboard
templates.description: LMS login and engagement analytics. Colorful KPI badge strip (6 cells: Logins Today/Unique Today, Logins Week/Unique Week, Logins Month/Unique Month) + three-column middle row: Logins by Job table, YOY Login trend line, Last 4 Weeks trend area chart. Bottom: Recent Logins detail table (Employee, Email, Manager, Org, Login Time). Tracks platform adoption and active usage patterns.

panels.strip: logins_today + unique_today + logins_week + unique_week + logins_month + unique_month
